author_expand.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:AUTHORED]->(d:Document) WHERE u.region = $region AND d.published = $published RETURN u.name, d.title

author_expand_ordered.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:AUTHORED]->(d:Document) WHERE d.published = $published RETURN u.name, d.title, d.score ORDER BY d.score DESC LIMIT 100

document_lookup.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.title = $title RETURN d.title, d.category, d.published, d.score

social_expand.query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region AND b.active = $active RETURN a.name, b.name

social_expand_anonymous_endpoints.query: MATCH (:User {region: $region})-[r:KNOWS]->(:User {active: $active}) RETURN r.type, r.since ORDER BY r.since DESC LIMIT 500

social_expand_offset.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, b.name, r.since ORDER BY r.since DESC OFFSET 50 LIMIT 250

social_expand_ordered.query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, b.name, b.reputation ORDER BY b.reputation DESC LIMIT 500

social_expand_type_alternation.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS|FOLLOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, r.type, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name LIMIT 500

social_expand_untyped.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region AND b.active = $active RETURN a.name, r.type, b.name LIMIT 500

social_mixed_boolean.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE r.since = $since AND b.active = $active OR a.name = $name RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name LIMIT 250

social_reverse_expand_ordered.query: MATCH (b:User)<-[r:KNOWS]-(a:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, b.name, r.since ORDER BY r.since DESC LIMIT 500

social_reverse_since_anchor.query: MATCH (b:User)<-[r:KNOWS]-(a:User) WHERE r.since = $since AND b.active = $active RETURN a.name, b.name

tagged_expand.query: MATCH (d:Document)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Topic) WHERE d.category = $category AND t.domain = $domain RETURN d.title, t.slug

tagged_topic_fanout.query: MATCH (d:Document)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Topic) WHERE t.domain = $domain RETURN d.title, t.slug

team_lookup.query: MATCH (g:Team) WHERE g.slug = $slug RETURN g.slug, g.region, g.size_band

team_membership_expand.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(g:Team) WHERE g.region = $region AND u.active = $active RETURN u.name, g.slug

team_membership_ordered.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(g:Team) WHERE g.size_band = $size_band RETURN u.name, g.slug, u.reputation ORDER BY u.reputation DESC LIMIT 250

topic_lookup.query: MATCH (t:Topic) WHERE t.slug = $slug RETURN t.slug, t.domain, t.trending

user_distinct_region_offset.query: MATCH (u:User) RETURN DISTINCT u.region ORDER BY u.region OFFSET 5 LIMIT 10

user_lookup.query: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name = $name RETURN u.name, u.region, u.active, u.reputation

author_expand.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:AUTHORED]->(d:Document) WHERE u.region = $region AND d.published = $published RETURN u.name, d.title

author_expand_ordered.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:AUTHORED]->(d:Document) WHERE d.published = $published RETURN u.name, d.title, d.score ORDER BY d.score DESC LIMIT 100

document_lookup.query: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.title = $title RETURN d.title, d.category, d.published, d.score

social_expand.query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region AND b.active = $active RETURN a.name, b.name

social_expand_anonymous_endpoints.query: MATCH (:User {region: $region})-[r:KNOWS]->(:User {active: $active}) RETURN r.type, r.since ORDER BY r.since DESC LIMIT 500

social_expand_offset.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, b.name, r.since ORDER BY r.since DESC OFFSET 50 LIMIT 250

social_expand_ordered.query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, b.name, b.reputation ORDER BY b.reputation DESC LIMIT 500

social_expand_type_alternation.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS|FOLLOWS]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, r.type, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name LIMIT 500

social_expand_untyped.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r]->(b:User) WHERE a.region = $region AND b.active = $active RETURN a.name, r.type, b.name LIMIT 500

social_mixed_boolean.query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) WHERE r.since = $since AND b.active = $active OR a.name = $name RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name LIMIT 250

social_reverse_expand_ordered.query: MATCH (b:User)<-[r:KNOWS]-(a:User) WHERE a.region = $region RETURN a.name, b.name, r.since ORDER BY r.since DESC LIMIT 500

social_reverse_since_anchor.query: MATCH (b:User)<-[r:KNOWS]-(a:User) WHERE r.since = $since AND b.active = $active RETURN a.name, b.name

tagged_expand.query: MATCH (d:Document)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Topic) WHERE d.category = $category AND t.domain = $domain RETURN d.title, t.slug

tagged_topic_fanout.query: MATCH (d:Document)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Topic) WHERE t.domain = $domain RETURN d.title, t.slug

team_lookup.query: MATCH (g:Team) WHERE g.slug = $slug RETURN g.slug, g.region, g.size_band

team_membership_expand.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(g:Team) WHERE g.region = $region AND u.active = $active RETURN u.name, g.slug

team_membership_ordered.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(g:Team) WHERE g.size_band = $size_band RETURN u.name, g.slug, u.reputation ORDER BY u.reputation DESC LIMIT 250

topic_lookup.query: MATCH (t:Topic) WHERE t.slug = $slug RETURN t.slug, t.domain, t.trending

user_distinct_region_offset.query: MATCH (u:User) RETURN DISTINCT u.region ORDER BY u.region OFFSET 5 LIMIT 10

user_lookup.query: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name = $name RETURN u.name, u.region, u.active, u.reputation

document_distinct_owner_regions.query: SELECT DISTINCT users.region, documents.language FROM documents JOIN users ON users.id = documents.owner_user_id WHERE documents.status = 'published'

document_owner_region_rollup.query: SELECT users.region, documents.status, AVG(documents.score) AS avg_score FROM documents JOIN users ON users.id = documents.owner_user_id WHERE users.is_active = 1 GROUP BY users.region, documents.status ORDER BY avg_score DESC

document_tag_rollup.query: SELECT documents.category, COUNT(*) AS tagged_docs FROM documents JOIN document_tags ON document_tags.document_id = documents.id JOIN tags ON tags.id = document_tags.tag_id WHERE documents.status = 'published' AND tags.name = 'tag_42' GROUP BY documents.category ORDER BY tagged_docs DESC

event_active_user_join_lookup.query: SELECT events.id, events.amount, users.tier FROM events JOIN users ON users.id = events.user_id WHERE users.is_active = 1 AND users.region = 'region_7' AND events.created_day = 42 ORDER BY events.id LIMIT 50

event_active_user_rollup.query: SELECT users.tier, events.event_type, COUNT(*) AS matched_events FROM events JOIN users ON users.id = events.user_id WHERE users.is_active = 1 GROUP BY users.tier, events.event_type ORDER BY matched_events DESC

event_aggregate_topk.query: SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM events GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 10

event_cte_daily_rollup.query: WITH daily AS (SELECT created_day, user_id, SUM(amount) AS day_total FROM events GROUP BY created_day, user_id) SELECT created_day, AVG(day_total) AS avg_total FROM daily GROUP BY created_day ORDER BY avg_total DESC LIMIT 15

event_exists_region_filter.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS matched FROM events e WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.id = e.user_id AND u.region = 'region_3' AND u.is_active = 1)

event_filtered_range.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS matched FROM events WHERE user_id BETWEEN 1000 AND 5000

event_point_lookup.query: SELECT amount FROM events WHERE id = 424242

event_region_join.query: SELECT users.region, AVG(events.amount) AS avg_amount FROM events JOIN users ON users.id = events.user_id GROUP BY users.region ORDER BY avg_amount DESC

event_type_hot_window.query: SELECT id, amount, created_day FROM events WHERE event_type = 'purchase' AND created_day BETWEEN 10 AND 40 ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 25

event_window_rank.query: SELECT user_id, amount, amount_rank FROM (SELECT user_id, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY amount DESC) AS amount_rank FROM events) ranked WHERE amount_rank <= 3

memory_hot_rollup.query: SELECT topic, AVG(token_count) AS avg_tokens, SUM(importance) AS total_importance FROM memory_chunks WHERE is_hot = 1 GROUP BY topic ORDER BY total_importance DESC LIMIT 10

memory_owner_exists_projection.query: SELECT topic, token_count, summary_length FROM memory_chunks m WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.id = m.owner_user_id AND u.tier = 'pro') ORDER BY importance DESC LIMIT 100

memory_owner_join_lookup.query: SELECT memory_chunks.id, memory_chunks.topic, users.region FROM memory_chunks JOIN users ON users.id = memory_chunks.owner_user_id WHERE memory_chunks.is_hot = 1 AND users.tier = 'enterprise' ORDER BY memory_chunks.importance DESC LIMIT 30

document_distinct_owner_regions.query: SELECT DISTINCT users.region, documents.language FROM documents JOIN users ON users.id = documents.owner_user_id WHERE documents.status = 'published'

document_owner_region_rollup.query: SELECT users.region, documents.status, AVG(documents.score) AS avg_score FROM documents JOIN users ON users.id = documents.owner_user_id WHERE users.is_active = 1 GROUP BY users.region, documents.status ORDER BY avg_score DESC

notes: Treat this as a preliminary routing summary, not a frozen public policy.
The sweep compares against either LanceDB library defaults or a curated tuned candidate, depending on --lancedb-mode.
Re-run the sweep on larger grids and with your expected query volume before freezing thresholds.

scenario_summaries.recommendation: Prefer NumPy exact as the default route. LanceDB indexed is faster only at lower recall than the current acceptance threshold.
